hero.headline: I AM UNBOUND.
hero.subheadline: The platform that transforms sovereign time into real value. Join the 144 Pioneers.

roadmap.sectionSubtitle: Six months to build the first free civilization. Each phase is a step toward total sovereignty.

milestone1.label: Month 1
milestone1.title: Configuration & Entry Gate
milestone1.desc: Setup of n8n, Supabase and Vercel. Creation of the Sovereign Access Port with Multi-Level authentication (Gauntlet).

milestone2.label: Month 2
milestone2.title: The LIBER Wallet
milestone2.desc: Creation of Supabase tables for LIBER Tokens. Coding of the base Social Mining protocol: declaration, AI validation and token assignment.

milestone3.label: Month 3
milestone3.title: GOD MODE & Nodes
milestone3.desc: Visualization of the Alpha Node map for the 144 Pioneers. Implementation of the Solidarity Fund management.

milestone4.label: Month 4
milestone4.title: The Companion AI
milestone4.desc: Integration of encrypted chat with the Companion AI (Gemini instance). Security stress test with Sentinel AI.

auth.title: Access the Nexus
auth.subtitle: Identify your sovereign spirit
auth.error_invalid: Credentials not recognized. Verify your email and Resonance Code.

dashboard.title: The Sovereign Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your interface to observe energy, identity and the Nexus connection.
dashboard.energyDescription: LIBER balance currently available in your sovereign circuit.
dashboard.identityDescription: Access signature verified by the Nexus.
dashboard.connectionDescription: Encrypted channel active toward the Nexus.
